# Love Over Exile — llms.txt
# https://loveoverexile.com
# Last updated: 2026-03-02

> Love Over Exile is a resource platform for parents experiencing parental alienation — the deliberate estrangement of a child from a loving parent by the other parent. Founded by Malcolm Smith, author of "Love Over Exile," the site combines lived experience, clinical understanding, and community support.

## About the Author

Malcolm Smith is an alienated parent and author who has lived through parental alienation firsthand. His book "Love Over Exile" offers a three-part framework: understanding what's happening, surviving the acute phase, and finding inner freedom.

## Site Structure

The site is organised around three core pathways:

### Part 1 — Understanding What's Happening
- [Understanding Parental Alienation](https://loveoverexile.com/understanding/): What parental alienation is, how it works, and why it happens
- [Start Here](https://loveoverexile.com/start-here/): Guided entry point for new visitors

### Part 2 — Surviving the Storm
- [Survival Guide](https://loveoverexile.com/survival-guide/): Practical strategies for the acute phase
- [Free Guide Download](https://loveoverexile.com/free-guide/): Downloadable survival guide

### Part 3 — Finding Inner Freedom
- [Inner Freedom](https://loveoverexile.com/inner-freedom/): Rebuilding identity and finding peace
- [You Are Not Alone](https://loveoverexile.com/you-are-not-alone/): Stories and solidarity

### Community & Resources
- [Community](https://loveoverexile.com/community/): Moderated forum for affected parents
- [Articles](https://loveoverexile.com/articles/): Research-backed articles on parental alienation
- [Resources](https://loveoverexile.com/resources/): Reading list, organisations, and support links
- [FAQ](https://loveoverexile.com/faq/): Frequently asked questions

### The Book
- [The Book](https://loveoverexile.com/the-book/): About "Love Over Exile" — waitlist and details

### About & Contact
- [About Malcolm](https://loveoverexile.com/about/): Author background and mission
- [Contact](https://loveoverexile.com/contact/): Get in touch

## Key Topics

- Parental alienation
- Alienated parents
- Parent-child estrangement
- Parental alienation recovery
- Parental alienation syndrome
- Co-parenting after separation
- Family court and custody
- Healing from parental alienation
- Children's rights in divorce

## Key Statistics

- Approximately 22 million children worldwide are affected by parental alienation
- Parental alienation is recognised as a form of psychological abuse by many mental health professionals

## Contact

- Website: https://loveoverexile.com
- Author: Malcolm Smith
